message:
test(err): epic completion — structural property tests (bd-err-3)

Final sub-bead of bd-err-epic. Adds 4 structural property tests
to lock in the formatter contract:

- property_output_starts_with_progname: 3 progname sizes verify
  output begins with the supplied progname bytes
- property_output_has_progname_separator: 8 input combinations
  (2 prognames × 2 message states × 2 errno states) verify ': '
  lands exactly after progname
- property_no_double_separator_on_empty_message_with_errno: locks
  in the regression — "prog: : err\n" (double ': ') is forbidden
- property_total_length_predictable: 4 (msg, errno) tuples verify
  output length matches the formula

12 core err unit tests + 7 err_h conformance tests = 19 tests for
the family, 0 divergences against glibc.

Closes bd-err-3 and bd-err-epic. Family now native:
- core/err/mod.rs       formatter + helpers, 200 lines + 12 tests
- abi/err_abi.rs        write_err_message reduced from 32 lines to
                        14-line shim; basename_bytes re-exported
                        from core
